process_startup_definition: external process wall time minus the processor-reported host_total; reported separately and never attributed to the enclave call

resource_counters.collector: psutil sampled from the Python parent process
resource_counters.normalized_peak_cpu_percent: maximum sampled process CPU-time delta divided by wall-time delta and logical CPU count, clipped to [0,100]
resource_counters.peak_private_bytes: maximum sampled psutil memory_full_info.private on Windows

native_vbs_pairing: Each row invokes TrustCircuitNative.exe and TrustCircuitHost.exe over the same request JSON, key, nonce, AAD, ciphertext, and TCVBSDS1 payload; execution order alternates by run.
